sky.dailyTheme: Warm confidence, honest signals, and visible connection.

horoscope.title: Forward Spark
horoscope.summary: Move with confidence today, but let timing do some of the work. A direct message or simple action carries more power than overexplaining.

Aries.metersHero: Energy is rising — make the first move.

horoscope.title: Steady Pull
horoscope.summary: Today favors calm progress and grounded choices. Let consistency become your signal instead of trying to force momentum.

Taurus.metersHero: Flow is steady — trust the slower rhythm.

horoscope.title: Open Channel
horoscope.summary: Conversations carry extra charge today. Say the thing clearly, then give people room to meet you halfway.

horoscope.title: Protected Light
horoscope.summary: Your instincts are sharper than usual. Move gently, but don’t ignore the quiet information your body already has.

horoscope.title: Visible Flame
horoscope.summary: The day responds to presence. Lead with warmth, not pressure, and the right people will naturally orbit closer.

Leo.metersHero: Your signal is bright — be seen.

horoscope.title: Clean Signal
horoscope.summary: Small refinements create real movement today. Fix the detail, send the note, clean up the system, and momentum returns.

Virgo.metersHero: Flow is strong — refine the path.

horoscope.title: Magnetic Balance
horoscope.summary: People are reading your tone more than your words today. Stay elegant, honest, and willing to name what feels off.

horoscope.title: Deep Current
horoscope.summary: Today rewards emotional precision. Don’t reveal everything at once, but don’t hide from what you already know.

Scorpio.metersHero: Depth is working — trust the current.

horoscope.title: Wide Signal
horoscope.summary: Your energy expands when you move, explore, or say yes to a fresh angle. Keep it light, but don’t waste the spark.

Sagittarius.metersHero: Energy is open — follow the spark.

horoscope.title: Quiet Build
horoscope.summary: Progress looks practical today. One focused action beats ten ideas, especially if it creates structure for tomorrow.

horoscope.title: Steady Signals
horoscope.summary: Today favors quiet momentum over dramatic moves. Trust your instincts — a subtle shift in timing or conversation can open something meaningful.

horoscope.title: Soft Compass
horoscope.summary: Your imagination is useful today, but only if you give it shape. Let intuition guide the first step, then ground it in action.

Pisces.metersHero: Flow is soft — follow the signal.

starSync.dailyTheme: Today’s Star Sync energy favors honest timing, emotional clarity, and natural attraction over forced intensity.
starSync.pairingNote: Use owner sign as the first sign and other person sign as the second sign.
